verification.command: git rev-parse HEAD and git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main
verification.head: 15e2e4ad20339fe125ca8f7884353a8fa36b3cfe

pacing_evidence.verdict: contradicts a verified 15-20 minute authored experience; distance padding is not pacing evidence

prior_findings.summary: Room 407 full-width wall replaced by aperture partitions.
Closed gates resist side bypass by dimensions and sampled rays.
15-20 minute authored pacing remains unproven and contradicted by route math.
Spawn and objective restore; fail retry still lacks production-path test.
Progression tests still bypass physical and UI paths.
Visual variant roots added; discreet transition, safe markers, and restore absent.
Master volume and subtitles added; mandatory audio/settings scope largely absent.
Modal interaction locks and Escape ownership fixed.
Agent and LOS added without nav content, bounded fallback, complete FSM, or fair tuning.
Ending action still requires chase_started only.
Fresh logs contain no ObjectDB leak warning.

accepted_findings.summary: A one-scene 870 m straight corridor uses walking distance as duration padding and does not establish an engaging 15-20 minute game.
Radio prompt reveals 0007; multiple actions and ending lack full semantic prerequisites or useful wrong-state feedback.
Variants pop visibly, teleport is immediate, and checkpoint restore leaves the hallway at Variant0.
No navigation content or bounded fallback exists; FSM/LOS behavior is incomplete and entity speed cannot pressure a moving player.
Mandatory buses, positional/loop audio, volume categories, display/comfort settings, reset, and in-game access remain absent.
Green tests bypass player physics, public UI interactions, opened-door traversal, AI capture, modal races, settings, and timed playthrough.
Advertised Tab objective review action has no consumer.
Room/open-door capsule traversal is not physically automated or manually evidenced.
